manifest.name: Kill and Yank

name: Kill and Yank

releases.author: inouetakuya
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* feat: Add two features by @sho7650 in https://github.com/inouetakuya/obsidian-kill-and-yank/pull/13
  * While typing in any language using an IME, kill-and-yank functionalities are disabled
  * Use a clipboard

## New Contributors

* @sho7650 made their first contribution in https://github.com/inouetakuya/obsidian-kill-and-yank/pull/13

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/inouetakuya/obsidian-kill-and-yank/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0
